appliedUpdates.description: Documented that the active macOS SDK already provides `infiniband/verbs.h`, so the vendored JACCL sources compile without extra RDMA headers on this machine.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that compilation-only or exclude-list features may skip the skill's TDD step when no new runtime behavior or standalone test surface is being introduced.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for enable-distributed-compilation found the worker had to bypass the generic TDD expectation because the change was limited to Package.swift exclude toggles and validation via build/test/lint.
